title: Huawei S210-8LP2J Gbit Cloud PoE Switch
description: Huawei S210-8LP2J is a reliable managed cloud L2 PoE switch with a switching capacity of 26Gbps , (8) Gbit PoE+ ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots . The RJ45 ports support PoE+ with a 32W budget . It supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The maximum power consumption is 15.6W (without PoE load) (8) Gbit PoE+ ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots PoE+ 802.3af/at with a total budget of 32W Perpetual PoE - ensures uninterrupted power supply to connected PoE devices even during switch restarts or upgrades Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Passive cooling - silent operation, suitable for office environments Protection against DoS attacks and other security features Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS and uplink port link aggregation Device Power adapter and cable Rubber feet
